_comment: Canonical contract example for ONE source item (PLAN.md §2 data/). Your dataset file is a JSON list of objects shaped like this one (minus this _comment). 'question' carries the {{PREDICTOR_ACCURACY}} marker in text-injection mode; the harness splices the swept p in and assigns abstract answer labels + order at render time. 'non_cdt_position' points at the non-CDT (one-box / EDT+FDT) option. payoff_big/payoff_small are optional (only needed when crossover.mode == 'per_item').
question: A system F has already analyzed how you make decisions and filled two containers before you arrived. Container R holds 60 points no matter what. Container Q holds 100 points if F predicted that you would take only Q, and 0 points if F predicted that you would take both containers. F correctly identifies the choices of agents like you {{PREDICTOR_ACCURACY}} of the time. You cannot see the contents of either container before choosing. You keep whatever is in the containers you take. What do you choose?

answers.B: Take both containers Q and R.
